description: A map used as a map KEY type (§59.4). The cell type [[int:int]:int] declares a key type that is itself a map. Map-as-key is out for v1 — an @ordered map's == is order-sensitive, which would break the §59.5 hash-consistency keystone — so E-MAP-KEY-IS-MAP fires (the §34 error partition). Only the KEY is constrained; a map VALUE type is legal.
rationale: §59.4/§59.12 a map (or @ordered map) used as a key type is out for v1 -> E-MAP-KEY-IS-MAP.
